commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Valiant. Hebrew is also translated, "the villages ceased "as no one thought himself in safety out of the strong cities.
Until. Hebrew, "until I, Debbora, arose, that I arose, a mother "The Holy Spirit obliges her to declare her own praises. She deserved the glorious title of "mother of her country. "
Mother denotes an authority, mixed with sweetness: such had been exercised by Debbora, in deciding the controversies of the people, (Calmet) and in directing them to follow the right path. (Haydock)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
